ha7bb0e38g199fg4b1egab7ag7a5baf558a69: Hells, we can't just leave. They're kin.
hcf9d3c04g4feeg4542gad6fg1c85bdcbba33: I'll not gamble our lives, our futures, on people who are as good as dead. We must leave for Baldur's Gate - at once.
hd05aa6aeg3f98g4963g86e3g1ed8bf64f2a4: Can we all just take a moment? Please?
hb02008a8g0eb9g415bgb5c4gd233e516ee16: What's the point in blades and spells if we don't bloody use them? We should stay.
h121d37afgb752g4541g944fg3d71cdf204ad: These people aren't fighters. We can help.
h77df96bdg0e48g4bcdg920agab08134f309f: Or yell louder. That's fine too.
h867271f6g4bbbg47cega60cg0802a195102d: Rolan's right, sis. We should leave - while we still can.
h0d61777ege5c5g4b8bga97cg036e41cb73a9: Or would you deny your brother here his chance at fortune in Baldur's Gate?
h90308378gaa9ag409ega91bg42d2f4df3933: Argh. Fine. Let's sneak away like godsdamned cowards.
h7baa3651g5d29g482agb8e4gab61e2ff1080: But if something happens to these people, it's on us. I hope you know that.
h7919699cg6704g4e75g9623g189adeb88218: Get out while you can - the goblins will be back.
h32bb499dgaa56g4313gaa53ge6ac5a281f95: Common sense at last. Let's get out of this death trap.
he5ae0c07g54cdg4d47gab33gc5811c0bb0aa: C'mon, sis. We're less of a target alone. We should leave.
h8e1ab409g09a2g44adgaed6gda118889a2c7: You should all stay. A single blade could make a difference.
haf6dc7cag98d2g47e7ga9e7gda4b8da88c66: Thank you! It's the right thing to do, and you know it.
ha2dd8d07g7479g4612g8a31g61ac12c3fe98: She's right, Rolan. We're better than this.
h0dffbbddgd361g4d11ga397g00d79cc87dc3: Zurgan. Fine. I'll stay too. Lest you both end up with your throats slit by a goblin blade.
h388a45c5ge15ag4caag8a97gfb62897168d7: No. This place is a death trap. Let us leave - immediately!
hc0bcae12gcd10g41c2g8edfg98da1975ae73: You want fortune? There's coin in it if you stay.
h94041d9eg8cc3g4706ga1b8g6f9870f46dad: You know, that money could go towards a spiffy new outfit for your apprenticeship...?
h1e15e748g43e3g47ffgb45eg4616b3d43e9d: If we survive, it'll make for a good story I suppose...
h1bc2b0aagb559g4887gb4abg3c85c4a44f17: Thank you, Rolan. And thank you, friend.
haadfbdc5g2cf5g43deg81cbg6d08c4610baa: But it is, nevertheless, true. We've risked everything to get this far, we can't afford to throw it all away.
hd7295ba6g865fg49e5ga5cbge694f8e04ec7: Clan is everything. You don't abandon those you swore to protect.
hec627dc8gfb47g45eag8be4g83038572013b: I made no such oath, and I will not be held reponsible for these people.
h455d22e9gb7edg47f0g8e61g015e185dd560: If they cannot fight, they will die. That is at it should be.
h3721c5eaga8e2g437fg890eg7fd9531b69a9: Exactly! These types always need saving. We shouldn't sacrifice ourselves for them.
h9f9fb70agab56g46bagb581g9b1456b7765a: Have you forgotten Elturel? We should stand by our people - no one else will.
h52511abeg827fg4bc3gb39bg27a87ccd4175: This isn't Elturel and I'm not responsible for every damn tiefling in the world!
hb56f779bg49afg46f0g8a37gbce5a664bc99: Just be responsible for yourself then. We have to stay; it's the right thing to do.
hcd778c09g359eg4b73g9b0dg394acee91aa1: Zurgan. Fine! We'll stay. If we survive, it'll make for a good story I suppose...
hc1491b4ag4d00g42dcg8cefga681f72158a6: Only cowards run from a fight.
h4f3c3cecg3bccg4082gbd6cg033536d5dc61: - prove him wrong then. If you think you're able, that is.
ha39ea386geb07g482fga31agd72d1c0d6e0e: - prove her wrong then. If you think you're able, that is.
h08aa37e1g5439g4efeg8be4gac4802648a6f: I'd choose the wilderness over the dangers of a city any day. Stay.
h5821cec8gf355g422cgb564gf6a06a6dc2b7: What? The dangers of overpriced taverns and muddy streets? I think I'll take that risk.
hac202606ga81dg436eg983ag7e5e5090492c: The city's not going anywhere. I'm staying - we're needed here.
hd51cdb70g2a4fg41a7ga425g3e7fe9cce794: Why die for those who can't defend themselves?
h770187c8g4ebeg479fg9da6g374e0812afd3: Exactly! Hear that, Lia? We're not helping anyone if we're corpses.
heddfc416gea27g4e76gadf2g51c8f77a6152: 'Where the weak have need, the strong have a duty'. Stay.
h062544fegad94g4fb8gb7c1g7f3c8ee004ef: Just like I was saying. I don't want all these lives on my conscience. We need to stay.
